pr.title: fix(mcp): route LanceDB + learn logs to stderr
pr.body:
## Summary
- LanceDB adapter logged to stdout via `console.log`/`console.warn`, corrupting MCP JSON-RPC responses for strict clients (Codex CLI)
- Changed all `console.log`/`console.warn` to `console.error` in `lancedb.ts` (7 sites) and `learn.ts` (3 sites)
- MCP stdio entry (`index.ts`) already used `console.error` correctly

## Root cause
Codex CLI MCP client enforces clean stdout (JSON-RPC only). The `[LanceDB] Connected at ...` log line mixed into stdout before the initialize response, causing handshake failure: `connection closed: initialize response`.

## Test plan
- [x] Manual MCP handshake test: stdout now contains only JSON-RPC response
- [x] Codex CLI connects successfully and calls `arra_search` via MCP
- [x] Claude MCP connections unaffected (7 instances running)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
pr.author: TTT3P
